task: Advanced high-value task: Ontology Mapping Candidate Risk-Adjusted Priority Model. Scenario: a high-value system is approaching an engineering gate and the owner needs a defensible go/no-go packet for ontology mapping candidate. Embedded packet: Records: R1 confidence_pct=79 type_compatible=116 cardinality_risk=8; R2 confidence_pct=88 type_compatible=112 cardinality_risk=11; R3 confidence_pct=74 type_compatible=127 cardinality_risk=7. Remediation options: O1 changes confidence_pct by -12% cost=96500; O2 changes type_compatible by -18% cost=109300; O3 changes cardinality_risk by -25% cost=66700; max_budget=135600. Rules and constraints: accept confidence>=85 and type compatible; 65-84 requires curator review; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: write a specialist-facing memo that distinguishes calculation results, assumptions, missing inputs, and expert-review questions. Deliver ontology_mapping_1.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
